fields.description:
# Bring provider configs under version control + repo-wide CLAUDE.md reference sweep

## Why

Once `AGENTS.md` is canonical, two things must happen so the migration ships to other providers
and clones: (1) the committed-tree references to `CLAUDE.md` must move to the new structure, and
(2) the provider-config scaffolding must be **committed** — a spike found that `.codex/config.toml`
and `.agents/rules/rebar.md` are **untracked, locally `.git/info/exclude`d files on one machine**
(`git ls-files` returns nothing for them), so today no other clone or provider sees them.

## What

A `git grep 'CLAUDE\.md'` over tracked files gives the complete surface (24 refs). Ownership is
split, and this story owns a defined subset:

- **This story updates** (CLAUDE.md → AGENTS.md or the new docs home): `CONTRIBUTING.md:570`,
  `README.md:354`, `rebar.toml:3`, `docs/architecture.md:65,233`, `docs/api-stability.md:25`,
  `docs/exit-codes.md:43`, `docs/jira-sync-setup.md:484`, `docs/llm-framework.md:462`,
  `docs/releasing.md:250`, `docs/workflow-editor.md:160`, `docs/workflow-engine.md:29`,
  `docs/adr/0043-…:121`, `docs/plan-review-criteria-guide.md:462,467`,
  `scripts/jira-pressure-test/e2e_field_validation_probe.sh:130`, and the plan-review criteria
  text in `src/rebar/llm/plan_review/criteria_routing.json:407`,
  `src/rebar/llm/reviewers/plan_review_T5e.md:10`, plus the prose comment in
  `src/rebar/reducer/_processors.py:307`. (The rename breaks zero code — every `src/` hit is a
  prose comment; the unrelated `CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID` env var does not match `CLAUDE.md`.)
- **Owned by other stories (out of scope here):** `docs/event-schema.md:46` (S1 replaces that
  pointer) and `examples/claude-skills/{rebar-implement/SKILL.md,rebar-janitor/phases/discovery.md}`
  (S5 repoints them).
- **Deliberately NOT changed:** `CHANGELOG.md` (3 hits) — a changelog is a historical record of
  past changes made when the file *was* `CLAUDE.md`; rewriting it would falsify history.
- **Commit the Codex config:** bring `.codex/config.toml` under version control (`git add -f`,
  it is currently locally excluded) pointing at `AGENTS.md`, comment updated to the completed state.
- **Commit the generic rules file:** bring `.agents/rules/rebar.md` under version control as a
  concise distillation that **references `AGENTS.md`** as the source of truth (Antigravity
  `.agents/rules/*` does not support `@`-imports, so a short reference-and-summary, not a symlink).
- **Per-tool pointers:** record the decision on optional `.github/copilot-instructions.md` /
  `.cursor/rules` / Gemini config. Default: **defer to a follow-up** (none added here).

## Scope

In: the ~17 owned files listed above, `.codex/config.toml`, `.agents/rules/rebar.md`. Out: files
owned by S1/S5, `CHANGELOG.md`, the root-file/template changes. **Depends on S1, S2, S3** (S1 and
S5 must land their reference updates for the global tree to be clean; S2 must create `AGENTS.md`).
Rollback: `git revert` — docs/config/text only, no data migration.

## Assumption (flag for override)

The epic's goal (guidance *available to* Codex/Cursor/Antigravity) is only met if the provider
configs are committed, so this story brings `.codex/` and `.agents/` into version control. If the
team wants provider configs to stay per-developer/local, drop those two bullets.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] After this story (and its S1/S5 dependencies land), no `CLAUDE.md` reference remains in the
  tracked tree except the intentional thin `CLAUDE.md` pointer file and the historical
  `CHANGELOG.md` entries.
  - Proving: `[ "$(git grep -c 'CLAUDE\.md' -- ':!CLAUDE.md' ':!CHANGELOG.md' ':!docs/experiments' | awk -F: '{s+=$2} END{print s+0}')" = 0 ]`
- [ ] The plan-review criteria text (both the `src/rebar/llm` files and the
  `docs/plan-review-criteria-guide.md` mirror) references `AGENTS.md`, not `CLAUDE.md`.
  - Proving: `[ "$(git grep -c 'CLAUDE\.md' -- src/rebar/llm docs/plan-review-criteria-guide.md | awk -F: '{s+=$2} END{print s+0}')" = 0 ]`
- [ ] `.codex/config.toml` is git-tracked and points at `AGENTS.md`.
  - Proving: `[ -n "$(git ls-files .codex/config.toml)" ] && git grep -q 'AGENTS.md' -- .codex/config.toml`
- [ ] `.agents/rules/rebar.md` is git-tracked and references `AGENTS.md` as the source of truth.
  - Proving: `[ -n "$(git ls-files .agents/rules/rebar.md)" ] && git grep -q 'AGENTS.md' -- .agents/rules/rebar.md`
- [ ] [operator-attested] The per-tool-pointer decision (default: defer) is recorded as a comment
  on this ticket citing the choice.
- [ ] `make lint && make test` pass and the module-size CI gate is green.
  - Proving: `make lint && make test`
